commands.review_summary:
The PR resolves explicit relative SQLite database paths before shared/per-agent cache use, moves SQLite busy_timeout ahead of WAL setup, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +149. Total +149 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main caches explicit relative SQLite paths by raw string, and the PR adds a concrete child-process cwd-change test path for the shared and per-agent openers; I did not run it because this review is read-only.

target.title: fix(state): harden sqlite path caching
target.body:
## Summary

- Resolve explicit relative SQLite database paths before caching shared and per-agent Kysely handles.
- Key registry entries by the concrete resolved path so callers from different cwd values cannot reuse a handle for the wrong database file.
- Apply SQLite `busy_timeout` before enabling WAL so lock handling is in place during PRAGMA setup.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: SQLite path caching could reuse a DB handle for a relative path that resolved to different files under different process cwd values.

Real environment tested: local macOS gwt with symlinked `node_modules`; delegated Blacksmith Testbox changed-gate for full core type/lint guard coverage.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/state/openclaw-agent-db.test.ts src/state/openclaw-state-db.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/state/openclaw-agent-db.paths.ts src/state/openclaw-agent-db.ts src/state/openclaw-state-db.ts src/state/openclaw-agent-db.test.ts src/state/openclaw-state-db.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed`

Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 1 shard / 24 tests locally; targeted oxlint returned 0 warnings and 0 errors; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings; delegated Testbox `tbx_01kt0rr2c7c9kge6rkwe5kx49d` passed `pnpm check:changed` with core + coreTests lanes.

Observed result after fix: relative shared-state and agent DB path tests open distinct SQLite files for distinct cwd values, while absolute/canonical aliases still reuse the same handle.

What was not tested: destructive live user-state migration; this patch only changes runtime handle cache keying and PRAGMA setup order.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/state/openclaw-agent-db.test.ts src/state/openclaw-state-db.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/state/openclaw-agent-db.paths.ts src/state/openclaw-agent-db.ts src/state/openclaw-state-db.ts src/state/openclaw-agent-db.test.ts src/state/openclaw-state-db.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- Testbox `tbx_01kt0rr2c7c9kge6rkwe5kx49d`: `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed`

Note: local `tsconfig.core.json` typecheck is not valid from this sparse Codex worktree because `ui/config` is intentionally absent; Testbox covered the full core typecheck lane.
target.author: vincentkoc
